description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a robust black metal receiver and barrel assembly paired with wooden furniture. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are all made from a medium brown wood, showing a slightly worn texture that suggests frequent handling. The rifle has a curved, detachable box magazine made of black metal, typical of the AK platform. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with a front post and a rear notch, both integrated into the metalwork. The muzzle is fitted with a slotted flash hider, and the overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and reliability. The combination of wood and metal gives the rifle a distinctive, iconic appearance often seen in urban and conflict scenarios.
description: A classic AK-47 style rifle with black metal components and medium brown wooden stock, handguard, and grip. Features a curved magazine, iron sights, and a slotted flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view down the barrel, with the front sight and muzzle device clearly visible, minimal detail of the stock or magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the wooden and metal components and magazine visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the buttstock and the back of the receiver, with the magazine and barrel aligned away from the viewer.
